data.content: Implementation review rejected. Findings: (1) src/lib/agent-outcome-stats.ts still writes success-rate data to ~/.config/foolery/logs whenever NODE_ENV is not development, but the requirement is to store detailed stats in the application's working directory. (2) src/lib/terminal-manager.ts still treats terminal states as successful iterations on exit code 0, but success is limited to moving to the next queue state or the prior queue state. Sanity gates: bunx tsc --noEmit passed, bun run test passed, bun run build passed; bun run lint did not complete because the script invokes bare eslint with no target.
